chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5384 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.24789/2023 3. For hearing of main case 23-04-2025 None present for the petitioner Mr. Ghulam Mujtaba Sahito, advocate for respondent On the last date following order was passed:- Per learned counsel for respondent No.6 the petition is not maintainable and is covered under the Supreme Court judgment in the case of Collector of Customs, Customs House, Lahore and another vs. Wasim Radio Traders, Lahore etc. (Civil Petitions No.323-L to 326-L of 2014). He states that the matter is also subject of a Division Bench judgment of this court reported as 2024 PTD 736. Be that as it may, brief is being held for petitioner’s counsel and adjournment is being sought. To come up tomorrow i.e. 23.04.2025. Today, despite a fixed date, petitioner remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
